title: bartmod
description: Adds the dreamstone from mario & luigi dream team as an ore
body:
semi-ok mod i made that adds the dreamstone from mario & luigi as an ore.
originally on curseforge, i decided to make it be on modrinth. 
since saying that its an ore isnt enough for modrinth heres a bigger description
the dreamstone item does nothing except be a crafting ingredient
you can make multiple tools from the dreamstone
im pretty sure i added dreamstone armor
theres a lot of other things, the tools are better than netherite.

also has bedrock compression
compressed double compressed triple quadruple, then redrock orangerock yellowrock greenrock bluerock
